name: Sarah Johnson
message: Hi Joseph! I came across your portfolio and I'm impressed by your work. I'm looking for a developer to help build a web application for my startup. Would love to discuss this further.

name: David Mwangi
message: Hello, I'm interested in your ChurchFlow CRM solution for our church. Can we schedule a demo call to discuss the features and pricing?

name: Emily Wanjiku
message: Great portfolio! I'm a UI/UX designer looking for a developer to collaborate with on client projects. Let's connect!
